channel.title: Gastronauts
channel.description: Latest releases from Gastronauts on Dropout.tv

item.title: The World Is Your Beard
item.description:
Chefs Tiana Gee, Maia Domingues, and Christina Xenos create amazing gluten-free meals for Siobhan, Ally, and Emily.

Duration: 38:04

Tags: Gastronauts, jordan myrick, food, cooking, competitions, eating, chaos, siobhan thompson, ally beardsley, emily axford

item.title: Doggone Good
item.description:
Chefs Courtney Wright, Adrian Castro, and Ara Zada are challenged to create an invisible meal for Jon, Luenell, and Lisa.

Duration: 46:05

Tags: Gastronauts, jordan myrick, food, cooking, competitions, eating, chaos, jon gabrus, luenell, lisa gilroy, courtney wright, adrian castro, ara zada

item.title: Business in the Front, Party in the Back
item.description:
Chefs Patrick Murray, Charlie Ray, and Kat Williams drag up spaghetti and meatballs for Landon Cider, Meatball, and Kim Chi.

Duration: 46:20

Tags: Gastronauts, jordan myrick, food, cooking, competitions, eating, chaos, landon cider, meatball, kim chi, patrick murray, charlie ray, kat williams
